generated_oml:
instance RaspberryPiSensor : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi sensor for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on the lab-scale gantry crane for real-time state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiSensor
    base:desc "Indoor air quality data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted via MQTT protocol to MQTT Broker"
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality data collected from Raspberry Pi sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureToolsEnabler
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data from the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based model for indoor air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureToolsEnabler
]

instance AzureToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enables [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin data management and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, PredictionService, SimulationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enables [
    base:desc "Enabler for crane operation control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for historical data storage"
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enables [
    base:desc "Containerization technology for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enables [
    base:desc "GitHub version control for digital twin model management"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous logging of historical data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of crane and air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting virus spread based on air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating crane operations and air quality scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of gantry crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of physical-digital synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying digital twin components using containerization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control of digital twin models using GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to deployment of digital twin components"
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to version control and model management"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logs for system validation and analysis"
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane and indoor air quality parameters"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictions for indoor air quality and virus spread prevention"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for system evolution studies"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control actions for gantry crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation insights ensuring synchronization between physical and digital components"
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for real-time data transmission"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Application subscribing to MQTT topics and logging data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MQTTBroker, LoggingApplication, RaspberryPiSensor, CraneStateSensor, AutomationMLModel, AzureToolsEnabler, TimescaleDB, OptimalControlEnabler, ContainerizationEnabler, GitHubEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Human Machine Interface (HMI) or Trajectory Generator Service are transmitted via MQTT to the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute movements on the Physical Crane. Command formats, validation, authentication, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Uses containerization for component deployment and integration, following an ad-hoc architectural approach without a commercial digital twin framework, with system architecture visualized using the C4 Model's context and container diagrams."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs an MQTT publish-subscribe architecture for inter-service communication, with the MQTT Broker as the central hub. Network topology is centralized, but bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML is used as a modeling standard, and Microsoft Azure tools are employed for cloud services, though specific compliance frameworks or certifications are not detailed in the documents."
]
